seoTitle: Upper Myall vs Upper Orara — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Myall and Upper Orara. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Myall vs Upper Orara: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Myall and Upper Orara.
heading: Upper Myall vs Upper Orara — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Myall, New South Wales and Upper Orara, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Myall has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Upper Orara (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Myall or Upper Orara safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Myall has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Upper Orara scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Myall scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Orara scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Myall or Upper Orara?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Myall has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
